sourceNoteIntro: This Pulse uses CRMLS / InfoSparks data for Seal Beach, with the article read and chart defaulting to the Residential / Single family live MLS slice sourced from 7/5/2026. The broader Residential export is also available from 7/2/2026. It also uses official city, school, federal, state, and consumer sources for local due-diligence context. Use this as orientation, not a property valuation, legal opinion, lending quote, insurance opinion, school assignment, or forecast.

notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: inventory competition versus pending demand. Primary keyword: Seal Beach housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: Seal Beach housing market; Seal Beach real estate market update; Seal Beach home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in Seal Beach; Seal Beach home selling market; Seal Beach homes for sale inventory; Seal Beach days on market; Seal Beach listing price; Seal Beach seller market; Seal Beach housing market 2026; Seal Beach market update sellers; Seal Beach median home price; are home prices dropping in Seal Beach; is now a good time to sell in Seal Beach. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, monthsSupply, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
